definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="47" y="61"><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">limit_max_health</field><field name="comment">Decide the entity health limit in the execution machine</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">limit_max_health</field><field name="value">60</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">basic_execution</field><field name="comment">Determine the basic machine damage per tick</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">basic_execution</field><field name="value">1</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">machine_protection</field><field name="comment">Once enabled, machines placed by others cannot be destroyed in non-creative mode.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">machine_protection</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">precision_mode</field><field name="comment">After being enabled, only entities killed by execution damage are considered machine kills.</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">precision_mode</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">infestation_amount</field><field name="comment">Determines the single-use bonus provided by socketing the killing gem</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">infestation_amount</field><field name="value">0.12</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
